pajeon-sauce.name: Pajeon Sauce
instructions: Combine all the ingredients in a bowl and mix well. Use immediately, or store for up to 2 weeks in a tightly sealed container in the refrigerator. Shake or stir well before using.

pancakes-with-fruit-teleculinaria.name: Pancakes With Fruit

ingredients.item: 300 g  farinha de trigo com fermento

instructions: In a bowl, beat the eggs, then add the sugar, the warm melted butter, milk and flour and continue to beat until you get a homogeneous dough.
Take a non-stick pan to heat, in mild heat, and grease with oil or butter. Have a shell of the pasta and let it cook for a few minutes, until it comes up "slurps."

Turn around with the help of a spatula and let it shine. Repeat the process until the mass is exhausted. Serve pancakes sprinkled with powdered sugar and cinnamon, with banana slices, blueberries and honey to taste.

panisses-with-sage-leaves-and-lemon.name: Panisses With Sage Leaves And Lemon
instructions: Pour 2 Tbsp. oil into an 8x8" baking pan; set aside. Bring a pinch of kosher salt and 4¼ cups water to a boil in a medium saucepan. Whisking constantly, gradually add chickpea flour. Once all the flour has been incorporated, reduce heat to low and cook mixture, whisking often to prevent scorching and to keep a skin from forming on top, until a thick lumpy porridge forms that is just starting to pull away from the sides of the saucepan, 20–25 minutes.

Transfer mixture to a food processor (keep saucepan close at hand) and process until smooth and very glossy, about 45 seconds. Working quickly so mixture does not start to set, transfer back to saucepan, season with more kosher salt, and cook over low heat, whisking often to prevent any new lumps from forming, until you can see the bottom of pan while whisking and mixture no longer tastes raw, 10–15 minutes.

Scrape mixture into prepared pan and quickly smooth top. Drizzle 1 Tbsp. oil over and cover with a sheet of parchment paper. Let cool, 1–1½ hours (you can speed this up by chilling mixture until cold).

Using the tip of a knife, slice mixture on an angle into 12 irregular strips of varying lengths and thicknesses. Heat remaining 1½ cups oil in a medium skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium-high until the first wisp of smoke appears. Working in 2 or 3 batches, fry strips (if panisses are not submerged in oil, add more just to cover), turning several times, until puffed, crisp, and golden all over, about 5 minutes per batch. Transfer panisses to paper towels to drain and sprinkle with sea salt.
Add sage to skillet and cook just until crisp, about 10 seconds, then transfer to paper towels to drain.
Top warm panisses with sage and serve with lemon wedges.
Do Ahead: Panisse mixture (before cutting) can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

parmesan-chicken-tenders.name: Parmesan Chicken Tenders

ingredients.prep: boneless chicken breasts, cut into strips

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Spray a baking sheet with cooking spray.
Season chicken strips with salt and pepper.

Combine flour, Italian seasoning, paprika, garlic powder, and onion powder in a resealable plastic bag. Add chicken strips and seal the bag. Shake the bag until chicken strips are well coated with the flour mixture.
Beat eggs together in a small bowl. Combine bread crumbs and Parmesan cheese in another bowl.
Dip each chicken strip into egg until well coated, then dip in bread crumb mixture to coat. Place on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven, flipping halfway, until golden brown and no longer pink in the center, 35 to 40 minutes.

parmesan-crusted-salmon.name: Parmesan Crusted Salmon
instructions: Preheat oven to 400˚F (200˚C).
In a medium bowl, mix the parmesan crust ingredients.
In a separate bowl, whisk egg. Dredge the salmon in the egg, then parmesan.
Lay the salmon on a baking sheet. Lay asparagus beside the salmon. Drizzle with olive oil, then season with salt and pepper.
Bake for 10-12 minutes.
Enjoy!

pasta-pastry-recipe-lezzet.name: Pasta Pastry Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 big bowl white cheese and fine snacks mixtur Home

instructions: 1. Heat the oven to 180°C and grease a large oven container light.
2. Take a large Steak of butter cake, add the mixture of cheese and parsley, and mix it into light.
3. 3 eggs, milk and liquid oil in a separate container is empty.
4. One of the Yufka is cool to the oven container, uabout u of the cake harvester for the car; broadcast one.
5. U broadcast one of the most cool and cooked cake three.
6. Place the last yufka to the sack cake top (can increase the number of according to the layer to request).
7. Eggs and milk for eggs, böremove snacks.
8. demands on the request, you can sprinkle red powder pepper or smash liquor.
9. Ö from the heated oven to 25–30 minutes, u cook until golden yellow.
10. Wait for a little cool after the oven crack and fortune by sliceing.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

pataniscas-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Pataniscas Recipe
instructions: Place the flour, yeast and eggs in a bowl and wrap. Add the sparkling water gradually, always stirring with a wire rod.
Acrescente o bacalhau e a cebola, previamente descascada e picada.
Por fim, junte a salsa picada, tempere com uma pitada de pimenta e envolva tudo muito bem.
Light a frying pan with abundant oil and let it warm well. Add spoonfuls from the previous preparation and let fry on both sides until the pataniscas are golden. Take it back and run.

peach-mango-lumpia.name: Peach Mango Lumpia
instructions: In a large non-stick pan, combine mangoes, peaches and sugar. Stir well to combine then simmer over low heat until the fruit starts to break down, about 10 minutes.
In a separate bowl, whisk together cornstarch and water until cornstarch is dissolved into a slurry.
Add the cornstarch slurry in the pan with fruit. Bring a low boil and cook until thickened, about 2 to 3 minutes. Transfer the mixture to a bowl and let cool, about 10 minutes.

Lay two lumpia wrappers on the work surface, slightly overlapping. Scoop about 2 tablespoons of peach mango mixture into the bottom thirds of the lumpia. Fold sides in while rolling until wrapper is rolled. Wet the end of the wrapper with water and seal. Repeat with remaining wrappers.
Add about 4 inches of oil to a large heavy-bottomed pot. Heat oil to 177°C (176°C).
Working in batches, carefully place the rolls into hot oil and fry until deep golden brown, about 3-4 minutes. Place on a paper towel lined sheet to drain excess oil then repeat with remaining rolls.

peach-tartlets-with-apricot-glaze.name: Peach Tartlets With Apricot Glaze

ingredients.prep: pitted, and thinly sliced, or more as needed

instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Line 2 baking sheets with parchment paper.

Cut each sheet of puff pastry into nine 3-inch squares. Dab a small amount of apricot preserves into the center of each square. Fan 3 slices of peach over the preserves, leaving a slim border of pastry exposed. Spoon a small amount of apricot preserves over the peach slices.
Bake in the preheated oven, 1 baking sheet at a time, until puff pastry turns golden, about 10 minutes.
Thin remaining apricot preserves with 2 teaspoons hot water in a small bowl to make a glaze.

Spoon some of the glaze over each baked tartlet. Return to the oven and bake until tartlets are golden brown, about 2 minute more. Repeat with second baking sheet. Cool tartlets on a wire rack before serving, about 10 minutes.

peaches-and-tomatoes-with-burrata-and-ho.name: Peaches And Tomatoes With Burrata And Hot Sauce

ingredients.item: Ripe tomatoes or 1 lb. mixed tomatoes

instructions: Whisk oil, hot sauce, vinegar, and honey in a small bowl until honey is dissolved; season with kosher salt. Toss peaches, tomatoes, and half of dressing in a medium bowl; let sit 5 minutes.
Transfer fruit salad to a platter. Top with burrata and drizzle with remaining dressing. Scatter a few torn tarragon sprigs over and season with sea salt.

peameal-bacon.name: Peameal Bacon

ingredients.item: Coarse cornmeal or 1 1/2 cups dried yellow peas
ingredients.prep: roughly milled in a food processor

instructions: 1. In a plastic (preferably) container large enough to hold both the brine and the meat, mix together the water, maple syrup, salt, cure, and spices.

2. Scoop out a scant 1 cup (200 ml) brine, and use it to load the brine injector. Then, inject the loin every 3/4 to 1 inch (2 to 2.5 cm), inserting the needle about 3/4 inch (2 cm) deep. Try to distribute the brine evenly over the loin. Place the loin in the container with the remaining brine, and keep the meat submerged with the help of a plate or an object of a similar build. Cover and refrigerate for 4 full days.
3. Remove the loin from the brine and pat it dry. Then roll it in the meal of your choosing. Give it a day's rest, uncovered, in the fridge, so the meal and meat form as one.

4. You have two options on cooking it: you can slice it and griddle it for a minute on each side (for thin slices that is), or you can bake it at 191°C (190°C) for about an hour, or until it has a core temperature of 61°C (61°C), then slice it. I like it the first way, especially when it gets a bit burnt on the edges and I have added a dash of maple syrup that caramelizes a bit toward the end.

peanut-and-apricot-cheesecake-lezzet.name: Peanut And Apricot Cheesecake
instructions: 1. Make all the material from the robot for ground-nut base.
2. The biscuit base that you prepared into a mold with oiled paper serrated round clamp is pressed by hand, also broadcast the inner walls.
3. Wait in the refrigerator until preparing the inner material.
4.   blend all the material outside the egg for the inner material of the dough.
5. Mix the eggs with the help of mixers until they get a homogeneous consistency by adding a mixture of flour.
6. Crochet apricots in the form of cube.
7. Make biscuits also flour.
8.   pour the half of the inner material you have left in the refrigerator into the peanuted mold.
9. Spread half and apricot pieces of biscuit crumb on it.
10. The remaining material is prepared in the same way and sprinkle the biscuit crumb and apricot parts on top.
11. 11. Preheated 170 degree oven, with a small bowl of heat resistant, place the suffice mold and cook for about 1 hour.
12.   Serve with peanuted and apricot cheesecake after cooling.

peanut-butter-pie-xiv.name: Peanut Butter Pie Xiv
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine condensed milk, lemon juice, peanut butter, and marshmallow creme. Beat until smooth. Fold in whipped topping.
Spoon 1/4 of peanut butter mixture into each graham cracker crust. Spread half of fudge topping over each peanut butter layer. Spoon half of remaining peanut butter mixture over each fudge layer.
Garnish with chopped nuts. Freeze until firm, then serve.

peanut-milk.name: Peanut Milk

ingredients.item: (packed) dark muscovado sugar or dark brown sugar

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Roast peanuts on a rimmed baking sheet, stirring occasionally, until golden, about 15 minutes. Transfer peanuts to a large heavy high-sided sauce-pan. Add milk, cream, and sugar. Scrape in seeds from vanilla bean; add bean. Bring to a simmer over medium-low heat and simmer until mixture is reduced by a quarter, about 45 minutes.
Remove from heat. Let steep until cooled to room temperature, about 2 hours. Cover and chill overnight.

Remove vanilla bean from peanut mixture. Working in 2 batches if needed, purée peanut mixture in a blender on medium-low speed until smooth. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a medium pitcher; discard solids in strainer. Cover and chill until cold, about 2 hours. DO AHEAD: Peanut milk can be made 5 days ahead. Keep chilled.
Divide chilled peanut milk among small glasses and serve.

pears-with-chocolate-and-almonds-telecul.name: Pears With Chocolate And Almonds
instructions: Light a pot with water and sugar and let it boil. Add the lemon tea, lower the heat and leave it in infusion for 2 minutes.
Meanwhile, peel the pears, keeping them whole. Remove the tea sachet and add the pears to the pot. Let it cook in a light for 10 minutes. Remove, drain and reserve.
Melt the chocolate in a water bath or microwave until it is homogeneous and liquid. In a very hot non-stick pan, the rolled almonds tower for 3 minutes, stirring always so as not to burn.
Put the pears on a serving plate and water them with melted chocolate, but without covering them completely. Sprinkle with the toasted almonds and serve.

penne-alla-arrabbiata-a-delicious-dish-c.name: Penne Alla Arrabbiata, A Delicious Dish
penne-alla-arrabbiata-a-delicious-dish-c.original_name: Penne alla arrabbiata, un plato delicioso
instructions: Vamos a iniciar nuestra receta, cocinando la pasta penne siguiendo las instrucciones de la marca. Debe quedar al dente. Cuela y reserva.
Ahora, calienta una cazuela con suficiente aceite de oliva.
He cuts his garlic and chili into sheets.
Haz lo propio con el tomate, pero en tiras.
Let's first drink the garlic to golden. Then you'll add his tomato concentrate and let them cook at medium heat for 5 minutes.
After that time, add the chopped tomatoes and chili. It condiminates with salt to taste, mixes and lets cook. for 5 minutes
Ahora, agrega la pasta a la cazuela, sube el fuego y mezcla para que la salsa impregne la pasta. Cocina por 3 minutos.
Apaga, sirve y espolvorea el perejil.
Enjoy!

pepper-salad-with-roasted-peppers-argiro.name: Pepper Salad With Roasted Peppers

ingredients.item: A few fresh mints finely chopped
A few fresh mints finely chopped

instructions: Preheat the ocean to 200°3 in resistance.
Wash the peppers well. Wipe them and add them to sheet metal.
Bake them for about 30 minutes, until the skin begins to darken and turn around.
Continue baking for an additional 20 minutes. Place them as hot as they are in a food bag or in a bowl with lid.
We close them well for 7'-10' to wet and easily peel.
Cut the onion into small boxes. Heat the olive oil in a pan.
Add the garlic for 1 minute and remove.
Add the onion and let it become transparent for 4-5 minutes, sprinkle with the sugar and put it out with the vinegar.
Add the tomato and simmer for 4-5 minutes.
Meanwhile, clean the peppers, removing their skin with a knife.
Remove seeds and stems and cut the coloured peppers into large frames or stripes.
Add them to the pan with the tomatoes.
Put out the fire. Salt at will and sprinkle with the herbs.
Serve the pepper salad warm or cold – it is perfect anyway!

peruvian-grilled-turkey-recipe-comedera.name: Peruvian Grilled Turkey Recipe
peruvian-grilled-turkey-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de pavo a la brasa peruano
instructions: Begin the recipe and put your umbrella on. If it's coal, light it up till the coils form. If your grill's electrical, light it ten minutes before cooking the turkey.
Toma el pavo y dale unos golpecitos para que se ablande por dentro. Enjuaga y seca muy bien.
In a bowl, place butter, butter, lemon grates and lemon juice. Bat very well till the mixture's soft and ointment.
In another bowl, add the cumin, rough salt, oregano, paprika, pepper, oregano and thyme to taste. That's a good mix.
Add two tablespoons of spices to butter and butter bowl and mix very well. The rest, hold up.
Toma el pavo, y son la ayuda de tus manos ve separando la piel del pavo sobre todo en la parte de la pechuga, sin romperla.
It proceeds and sees with a mixture of butter, butter and spices from inside the skin and with a good spread. Also add with his thighs and with his turkey.
Once the turkey gets impregnated with butter and butter, get a mix of spices and get his turkey completely seasoned. Be sure that every corner of the piece gets covered.
Toma hilo pabilo y amarra el pavo por los muslos para que al cocinarse, quede sujeto.

Once the grill or grill is ready, place the turkey onto the grids and cook them for about 3 or 3 and a half hours. Cooking should be a couple, that's to say while cooking, you have to go around and around so that the meat remains juicy and toasted out.
After that time and when you notice that it's at its point, get out of the grill and leave to stand about 20 minutes before cutting.
Corta tu pavo y disfruta en navidad.

pesto-trenette-recipe-comedera.name: Pesto Trenette Recipe

ingredients.item: 350 g de trenette (o tagliatelle si no encuentras)

instructions: Wash the potatoes and hit them. That's half an inch cut. Reserve cold water so they don't get rusted.
Wash the green beans, remove the ends and cut them into rods about 5 cm.
Put a big pot with abundant salty water to boil. When it boils, add the potatoes and the green beans. Kitchen 7-8 minutes.
In the same pot, add the dough and cook all together until the dough's at the dente (respect the minutes as indicated by the package). Thus flavors are integrated from cooking.
Reserve a glass of cooking water and drain the rest.
Give back the dough and potatoes and beans to the pot. Add the pesto and some cooking water to lighten the mixture. It gently removes till everything's well impregnated.
It serves at once with parmesan grated above and some toasted pineapples to bring texture.

petrale-sole-with-lemon-shallot-brussels.name: Petrale Sole With Lemon-shallot Brussels Sprouts

ingredients.item: Ground white pepper plus additional for seasoning

instructions: Combine flour, lemon peel, coarse salt, and 1/2 teaspoon white pepper in shallow bowl.

Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in each of 2 large skillets over medium heat. Coat fish in flour mixture and shake off excess. Add fish to skillets and cook until opaque and golden brown, 1 to 2 minutes per side. Remove from heat and season to taste with salt. Cover loosely with foil and set aside.

Wipe out 1 skillet. Add remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil and heat over medium heat. Add shallots and sauté until almost translucent, about 2 minutes. Add brussels sprouts and broth. Increase heat to medium-high and cook, stirring occasionally, until brussels sprouts are tender and liquid is almost completely absorbed, about 8 minutes. Remove from heat. Stir in butter. Season to taste with salt and white pepper.
Spoon brussels sprouts onto plates. Top with fish, sprinkle with chopped parsley, and serve.

pickled-red-onions.name: Pickled Red Onions
instructions: {'step_number': '1', 'description': 'Whisk 120ml apple cider vinegar, 7g sugar, 7.5g salt, and 240ml water in a small bowl until sugar and salt dissolve.'}

pilaf-with-almonds-and-plums-lezzet.name: Pilaf With Almonds And Plums

ingredients.item: 150 g of bird meat (also knows to be put on request)

2. Roast onions with water in steel pan.
3. Add the meats you sweat (Don't be afraid of sticking to the steel pan of the meats, the meats leave the pan in the pactice.

pineapple-flip-in-pan-an-easier-version-.name: Pineapple Flip In Pan: An Easier Version To Make
pineapple-flip-in-pan-an-easier-version-.original_name: Volteado de piña en sartén: una versión más fácil de hacer

ingredients.item: 1 can of pineapple cuts in syrup
1 ½ cups of wheat flour (for 24 cm frying pan)

instructions: In a large bowl, beat the eggs, sugar and vanilla until they double their volume and gain a pale yellow color.
Taste the flour with the baking powder and add them to the egg mix, biting gently to avoid clumps.
Add oil, milk, pineapple juice, cinnamon and pint of salt. Mix up to complete integration.
In a teflon frying pan with low heat, place 6 tablespoons of sugar and let it melt and have an unmoved golden tone.
Remove the frying pan from the fire and distribute pineapple slices onto the caramel. Put a cherry at the centre of each slice.

Fold the biscuit's mixture onto the fruit evenly. Cover the frying pan and cook with low heat for 20 minutes. If your frying pan doesn't have a cover, use a big plate or aluminum as an improvised cover.
Retire from the fire and demold quickly onto a plate before the caramel gets tougher. Let them cool a little before they serve.

pineapple-upside-down-pancakes.name: Pineapple Upside-down Pancakes

ingredients.prep: peeled, cut into eight 1/2' rounds, cored

instructions: Melt butter with cinnamon stick in a large heavy skillet over medium heat. Cook until butter begins to brown, about 2 minutes. Add pineapple slices; cook until light golden brown, 4–5 minutes per side. Remove skillet from heat; add rum and brown sugar. Cook over medium-high heat until juices are thick and syrupy. Transfer pineapple to a plate; let cool. Reserve syrup.
Preheat oven to 325°. Set a wire rack on a rimmed baking sheet. Whisk first 4 ingredients in a large bowl. Add buttermilk and next 3 ingredients; whisk until smooth.

Heat a griddle or large heavy skillet over medium heat. Lightly coat with nonstick spray. Working in batches, pour batter by 1/4-cupfuls onto griddle. Cook each pan- cake until golden brown and bubbles form on top, about 2 minutes. Top each pancake with a pineapple ring. Flip; cook until pancake is golden brown, about 2 minutes. Place pancakes on prepared rack and bake in oven until cooked through, about 5 minutes.
Rewarm reserved pineapple syrup. Divide pancakes among plates; drizzle with pineapple syrup.

pita-bread-recipe-lezzet.name: Pita Bread Recipe
instructions: 1. Internal of water; add sugar and wait for 5–10 minutes, activated.
2. Take a wide container of flour and salt.
3. Add water and olive oil to the pool.
4. Soft but unsticked dough knead (about 8–10 minutes).
5. Cover the dough with a clean coarser stretch film or moist cloth.
6. Leave the dough to leave for 1 hour in a place, double the dough and let it shine.
7. Pulp 6–8 equal parts divided, rolling and roller with about 1 cm thickness mm;in.
8. Ö Bake 5–7 minutes in refrigerator 230 degrees.
9. It is necessary that the attachment is rough and the interior of the space.
10. From the oven fry relax and wealth short suede under a clean kitchen cloth.

pita-with-milk-and-olives-lezzet.name: Pita With Milk And Olives

ingredients.item: Half pack age or instant dry yeast
Half cup sliced black zeyti Home

2. If you are using instant yeast, you can add directly to the dough.

5. Leave the dough to ferment.

16. Serve hot or warm.

pizza-rolls.name: Pizza Rolls

ingredients.item: Cabot new york extra sharp cheddar cheese

instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220°C). Grease a baking sheet with nonstick spray.
In a small bowl, mix together the basil, oregano, thyme, red pepper flakes, garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Set aside 1 tablespoon of the spice mixture for garnish.

In a medium bowl, toss together the Cabot New York Extra Sharp Cheddar Cheese and Cabot Monterey Jack Cheese. Fold in the remaining spice mixture and the pepperoni. Stir in the marinara sauce until evenly distributed.

Place a wonton wrapper on a cutting board. Brush the edges of the wrapper with water. Scoop a heaping teaspoon of the cheese mixture onto the center of the wrapper. Fold the top edge of the wrapper down over the filling, and then fold the bottom edge up to overlap for a long, rectangular shape. Press lightly to seal. Wet the short edges of the rectangle and fold toward the center to make a smaller rectangle.
Brush both sides of the pizza roll with water, then roll in the bread crumbs to coat. Repeat with the remaining ingredients.
Arrange the pizza rolls on the prepared baking sheet, seam side up. Lightly spritz the rolls with nonstick spray, then sprinkle each one with a pinch of the reserved spice mixture.
Bake the pizza rolls for 10–12 minutes, or until golden brown.
Let the rolls cool slightly, then garnish with parsley and serve with warm marinara sauce alongside for dipping.
Enjoy!

pizza-turkey-burgers-with-marinara.name: Pizza Turkey Burgers With Marinara

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat an outdoor grill for medium-high heat and lightly oil the grate.

Add 1/2 cup diced tomatoes to a large mixing bowl and mash with a fork until broken up. Add turkey, Parmesan cheese, bread crumbs, basil, egg, salt, and pepper. Gently mix until combined, then form into 4 patties.
Cook burgers on the preheated grill until cooked through, about 5 minutes per side.
Meanwhile, combine remaining tomatoes, oil, and Italian seasoning in a small blender or food processor; blend until smooth. Serve on top of cooked burgers.

pina-colada.name: Piña Colada

ingredients.prep: preferably coco lópez; well shaken before measuring

instructions: Place ½ fresh pineapple, peeled, cut into 1½" pieces in a resealable plastic bag, laying them flat. Freeze until solid, at least 3 hours.

Purée frozen pineapple, 6 oz. sweetened cream of coconut, 2 oz. unsweetened coconut milk, 8 oz. white rum, 1 oz. fresh lime juice, and 3 cups ice in a blender until smooth. Transfer blender jar to freezer; freeze until mixture is thickened (it should be the consistency of a milkshake), 25–35 minutes.

Blend again until mixture is the perfect slushy frozen drink consistency. Divide among 4 glasses. Top off each with ½ oz. dark rum (if using) and garnish each with a maraschino cherry and a lime wedge.
Do Ahead: Pineapple can be chopped 3 months ahead; keep frozen. Piña colada can stay in freezer up to 4 hours after first blend.
Editor’s note: This piña colada cocktail recipe was first printed in February 2016. Head this way for more of our best summer cocktails →

plum-and-banana-dessert.name: Plum And Banana Dessert
instructions: Layer plum slices in the bottom of 2 bowls. Top with a few spoons yogurt then layer with banana slices and remaining yogurt. Add small amounts of whipped topping on each dessert.

plum-fennel-salad-with-honey-ginger-dres.name: Plum-fennel Salad With Honey-ginger Dressing

ingredients.prep: toasted sesame seeds, and fennel fronds (for serving)

instructions: Whisk orange juice, vinegar, honey, 1 tsp. ginger, and salt in a medium bowl. Add plums and fennel to dressing; toss to coat. Cover and chill 30 minutes to allow fennel to soften and flavors to get to know one another.
Toss remaining ½ tsp. ginger into fruit salad. Serve drizzled with oil and topped with sesame seeds and fennel fronds.

poached-eggs-in-tomato-sauce-shakshouka.name: Poached Eggs In Tomato Sauce (shakshouka)
instructions: Heat oil over medium heat, add garlic and onions and cook until onions have softened and garlic is fragrant.
Add the crushed tomatoes, Worcestershire sauce, cayenne pepper, cumin and paprika. Stir to incorporate.
Add dice tomato and cook until sauce has thickened.
Using a spoon, create wells for the eggs, crack an egg into each well.
Cover and cook for another 5-8 minutes, until the egg whites are cooked but the yolk is still a bit runny. Garnish with parsley and feta cheese.
Enjoy!

pork-chop-marinade.name: Pork Chop Marinade
instructions: Place pork chops on a flat work surface. Slice horizontally through the middle, being careful not to cut all the way through to the other side. Open the two sides and spread them out like an open book.

Whisk olive oil, garlic, brown sugar, lemon juice, mustard, thyme, onion powder, Worcestershire sauce, vinegar, mesquite seasoning, parsley, salt, and pepper together in a bowl; pour into a large resealable plastic bag.
Add pork chops, coat with marinade, squeeze out excess air and seal the bag. Marinate in the refrigerator, 6 to 8 hours.
Preheat an outdoor grill for medium-high heat and lightly oil the grate. Remove chops from marinade and shake off excess. Discard remaining marinade.

Cook chops on the preheated grill until nicely browned on each side and slightly pink in the center, about 8 minutes per side. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center of each chop should read 63°C (63 degrees C). Let rest for 5 minutes before serving.

pork-chops-in-white-sauce-step-by-step-c.name: Pork Chops In White Sauce Step By Step
pork-chops-in-white-sauce-step-by-step-c.original_name: Chuletas de cerdo en salsa blanca paso a paso
instructions: We start by preparing the white mushroom sauce.
Warm up a medium frying pan and put a jet of vegetable oil and put half an onion cut into thin julians.
Also add very small chopped garlic.
Let them get some light for a few minutes. When the onion's starting to get clear then you're gonna add the mushrooms.
Ideally, you have the mushrooms cut into thin steaks (and you have cleaned them a little earlier).
cook everything at frying pan with medium heat for 10 minutes.
The mushrooms will be shrinking and pounding water.

pork-with-peas-and-tomato-sauce-argiro.original_name: Χοιρινό µε αρακά και σάλτσα ντοµάτας

Add the tomatoes and let the pork boil for about 50 minutes, until it softens.
Then we add the peas.

To the end of the boiling season and sprinkle with parsley.

potato-gnocchi.name: Potato Gnocchi
instructions: {'step': 'Preheat oven to 350°C.', 'text': 'Prick potatoes all over with a fork, then bake directly on oven rack until very tender, about 1 hour.'}
{'step': 'When cool enough to handle, scrape potato flesh into a medium bowl; discard skins.'}
{'step': 'Pass through a food mill or ricer onto a paper towel–lined baking sheet (to absorb excess moisture). Let cool completely.'}
{'step': 'Transfer potatoes to a large bowl, sprinkle with ¾ cup flour and 1 Tbsp. salt, and knead until a sticky dough forms.'}
{'step': 'Lightly flour your hands and work surface. Divide dough into 6 portions.'}
{'step': 'Roll each into a long, compact rope about ½“ thick.'}
{'step': 'Cut into 1“ pieces.'}
{'step': 'Working in 4 batches, cook gnocchi in a large pot of boiling salted water until they float, about 3 minutes.'}
{'step': 'Using a slotted spoon, transfer to a pan of tomato sauce as you go.'}
{'step': 'Sprinkle with Parmesan and serve with pork shoulder.'}

potato-gratin-recipe-lezzet.name: Potato Gratin Recipe
instructions: 1. Peel potatoes and slice fine round (mandolin is recommended).

potato-souffle-argiro.name: Potato Souffle
instructions: Clean the potatoes first.
Cut them with a knife in four or six pieces.
Place the potatoes in a pot, cover them with cold water, cover and boil, since they are boiled, for about 25 minutes. We drain them well.
Add them to the pot and set them back for a few minutes in medium heat to dry well for 1–2–1.
Add the butter and melt the potatoes with a fork.
Add the cream and let the mixture cool.
Add salt and pepper.
Add the nutmeg and cheese and mix.
Drop the yolks and mix well.
Beat the whites with hand mixers and a pinch of salt for 7'-8" to become a tight meringue.
Add 2-3 tablespoons of meringue to the potato mixture and mix with a spoon to dilute the texture of the mixture.
Add some more meringue and mix with a spoon.
Finally, add all the meringue to the mixture of potatoes and spatula with soft moves.Mix by folding the mixture from the bottom up until the meringue does not look white.

prawns-in-gabardine-recipe-comedera.name: Prawns In Gabardine, Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon of chemical yeast or royal powder

instructions: We'll start by peeling the prawns but we'll make sure we leave them with their pits, so characteristic of the prawns with them.

Then we'll mix the flour with the chemical yeast into a bowl as well as a touch of salt and pepper to taste. That little trick will make a great difference in the consistency of bouncing for shrimp. The ideal thing is to mix dusts with a fork.
Then we will add the contents of the egg and beer and we will revel with the flour, until we get a smooth blend. We have to be sure to mix well so that they don't have to be pitted.
When the mixture for bouncing's ready, we'll put an abundant jet of oil into a large frying pan. Once hot, we'll have every guba by the tail and put it into an egg, beer and flour mixture.

as we bounce every guba, we'll put it to frying into the oil, just as long as it takes to get a golden color from both sides. That way they'll get crispy and juicy and juicy inside. Depending on the size of frying pan, the shrimp may have to be frying in several tands, so that they are well cooked. It is important that they are not overlapping with each other and that there be some space for separation from the other.
Opcionalmente, al momento de sacar cada gamba ya cocida, podemos depositarlas sobre un plato recubierto con una hoja de papel absorbente, para retirar el exceso de grasa.
Sirve inmediatamente. Hay que consumir las gambas en gabardina calientes.

prepare-a-delicious-mediterranean-stuffe.name: Prepare A Delicious Mediterranean Stuffed Turkey
prepare-a-delicious-mediterranean-stuffe.original_name: Prepara un delicioso pavo relleno mediterráneo

ingredients.item: 1 whole turkey ((5-6 kg), clear and free)
4 cdas de aceite de oliva (virgen extra)
1 taza de aceitunas verdes y negras (deshuesadas y picadas)
1/2 taza de tomates secos en aceite
2 cdas de aceite de oliva  (virgen extra)

instructions: In a frying pan, heat up olive oil with medium heat and soften onion and garlic until transparent. Add dry tomatoes, olives, pines and fresh herbs (basil, rosemary and thyme). Cooking for 3-4 minutes to mix flavors.
Retirar la mezcla del fuego y agregar el pan rallado y el queso feta. Mezclar bien y ajustar con sal y pimienta al gusto. Reservar.

To purify the oven at 180 been 3 been (177 have been 3). place the turkey on a large baking plate and season with salt and pepper to taste, both outside and inside. Filling the turkey's cavity with the prepared Mediterranean mixture, pressurizing gently so that it remains firm.
Once filled, tie turkey legs with cooking thread and cover skin with olive oil. That will help your skin get crispy and golden.

To put the chicken stock and the white wine on the plate to keep the meat juicy and add flavour while cooking. Cover the turkey with aluminum paper and bake in the pressurized oven for about 2.5-3 hours, depending on the size of the turkey, occasionally sprinkle with its own juices.
Retiro the paper aluminum for the last 30 minutes of cooking so that the turkey's skin gets golden and crispy.

Remove turkey from the oven and leave to stand for 15-20 minutes before trench. That allows juices to distribute and maintain juicy meat. Serve the turkey with the pilling in each portion and accompany with garrison as baked vegetables or roasted potatoes.

prepare-grilled-chicken-thighs-with-garl.name: Prepare Grilled Chicken Thighs With Garlic And Parsley
prepare-grilled-chicken-thighs-with-garl.original_name: Prepara muslos de pollo a la plancha con ajo y perejil
instructions: Limpia los muslos de pollo y retira la piel. Hazle unos cortes para que se impregne muy bien del sabor de las especias.
In a medium container, it incorporates white wine and olive oil. Also add salt and pepper to taste.
Pela los dientes de ajo y filetea muy bien.
Add to the bowl, steamed garlic teeth and dehydrated parsley. It's a good mix to form a dressing.
Incorporates chicken thighs into the bowl, rinse them with dressing and leave them to be marinated for 30 minutes.
Pasada la media hora, calienta una plancha con un poco de aceite de oliva o mantequilla.

Roast the chicken thighs for 12 minutes from each side or until they are cooked and dyed. As long as they get roasted, brush his thighs with the tipple that's been put into the bowl to keep them juicy.
Una vez listos los muslos, retira de la plancha y sirve con tus guarniciones favoritas.
Enjoy!

prepare-jalapenos-stuffed-with-tuna-and-.name: Prepare Jalapenos Stuffed With Tuna And Cream Cheese
prepare-jalapenos-stuffed-with-tuna-and-.original_name: Prepara jalapeños rellenos de atún y queso crema
instructions: A bowl pits tuna, cream cheese, cheesebooks and pepper. Revels till the ingredients are integrated uniformly. Reserve.
Put the Jalapeños onto the direct fire for about 15- 20 minutes and turn them as his skin burns.
Retira del fuego y con cuidado quita la piel.
Cut the ends and cuts of jalapeños. It cuts lengthand removes the seeds and veins with a small spoon.
Fill chilies with tuna and cheese mixture. Serve and enjoy.

prepare-some-crispy-and-juicy-spicy-wing.name: Prepare Some Crispy And Juicy Spicy Wings
prepare-some-crispy-and-juicy-spicy-wing.original_name: Prepara unas crujientes y jugosas alitas picantes
instructions: We started production by adding chicken wings to a plate. Then we put the soybean sauce, the aji sauce, honey, sesame oil and salt and pepper to taste.
Once added all the ingredients, we mix that chicken wings get impregnated from all the ingredients and we get into the oven for 15 minutes at 200 been 3.
About five minutes before the wings are ready, we add to a frying pan with medium fire water, garlic, ginger, aji sauce and tomato sauce we revere very well till thick.
Once ready, we put up the baked chicken wings and we jumped into the salsa. When they're impregnated enough, we serve and enjoy.

prepare-some-juicy-grilled-chicken-breas.name: Prepare Some Juicy Grilled Chicken Breasts With Brown Rice
prepare-some-juicy-grilled-chicken-breas.original_name: Prepara unas jugosas pechugas de pollo a la plancha con arroz integral

ingredients.item: 2  pechugas de pollo sin piel (150 g cada una)
2 tazas de agua o caldo de verduras bajo en sodio
1 cda de aceite de oliva ( extra virgen)
1 / 2 cdite of sweet pimenton or paprika

instructions: Wash the whole rice well and leave it to moist for 20 minutes to smooth and reduce cooking time.
In a medium pot, it heats half a tablespoon of olive oil and pits garlic. Add pitted rice, mix and add water or broth. Cooking at medium low heat for 30-35 minutes till tender.
Mientras se cocina el arroz, seca las pechugas de pollo con papel absorbente.
Farms the chicken with lemon juice, salt, pepper, paprika and turmeric for at least 10 minutes.
Warm an anti-stick plate or frying pan with some drops of olive oil.
Cooking his breasts 4-5 minutes per side, till they are golden and juicy on the outside.
Serve the chicken with integral rice and decorate with fresh parsley.

prime-rib-gravy.name: Prime Rib Gravy

ingredients.item: Beef bone broth or high quality
Freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Roast until bones are deep brown and onions are black, about 1 hour. Use a spatula or tongs to transfer bones and vegetables into a saucepan. Drain off and reserve any rendered fat from the baking sheet for the gravy.

Add broth and water to the saucepan, and bring to a boil on high heat. Reduce heat to low and simmer until meat falls off bone and is flavorless, about 4 hours. Skim any fat from the surface and reserve.
Strain broth and let cool to room temp.
Melt butter in a pot on medium-high and sauté mushrooms until well browned. Add 2 tablespoons rendered beef fat and stir until melted. Add flour and cook for a few minutes.
Whisk in broth, and bring to a simmer. Cook, stirring occasionally, about 5 minutes. Reduce heat to medium and simmer until gravy has thickened to desired thickness, 5 to 10 minutes more
Adjust salt to taste and season with freshly ground black pepper, cayenne, and balsamic vinegar.
Serve and enjoy!

profiteroles-with-maple-caramel-sauce.name: Profiteroles With Maple Caramel Sauce

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
Diamond crystal or  0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 425°. Heat ¾ cup (1½ sticks) unsalted butter, ¾ cup whole milk, 1 Tbsp. granulated sugar (optional), 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ¾ cup water in a medium saucepan over medium-high, whisking occasionally to prevent scorching, until butter is melted and mixture is boiling (it should bubble vigorously, but watch it closely so it doesn’t boil over). Immediately remove pan from heat and add 1½ cups (188 g) all-purpose flour all at once. Whisk until incorporated and a paste forms. Return to medium-high heat and cook, mixing vigorously with a wooden spoon, until dough is the consistency of smooth mashed potatoes, about 30 seconds. Continue cooking, stirring constantly, until dough starts to dry out, creates a film on bottom of pot, and releases a lot of steam, about 3 minutes.

Transfer dough to the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment and beat on medium speed 1 minute. Reduce speed to medium-low and add 5 large eggs one at a time, beating to combine after each addition. Scrape down sides of bowl with a rubber spatula. Beat in 1 large egg white. Increase speed to medium and beat until dough holds medium-soft peaks when you lift paddle out of dough, 8–10 minutes. (The dough should be at or just above room temperature and texture should be visibly voluptuous, glossy and very smooth. When you pinch a bit between your thumb and index finger, you should be able to bring your fingers apart and have the dough stay connected by a thread.)
Beat 1 large egg yolk with 1 tsp. water in a small bowl to blend; set egg wash aside.

Scrape dough into a pastry bag fitted with a round ½" tip or a resealable plastic bag with 1 corner cut on a diagonal to make a ½" opening. Pipe 1½"-diameter rounds between 2 parchment-lined baking sheet, spacing about 1" apart. (Piping rows of 4 down the short sides and 5 across long sides works well.) Brush tops with reserved egg wash.

Bake profiteroles 10 minutes, then reduce oven temperature to 350° (do not open oven) and bake 15 minutes. Rotate baking sheets top to bottom and front to back, then continue to bake until golden brown and firm to the touch, 5–7 minutes more. Let cool.
Do ahead: Profiteroles can be baked 2 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature, or freeze up to 1 month. Reheat in a 250° oven until warm to the touch, about 5 minutes, or 8 minutes if frozen. Let cool before filling.

While the profiteroles are baking, melt 4 Tbsp. unsalted butter in a small saucepan over medium heat. Add ¾ cup heavy cream, ¾ cup pure maple syrup, and 1¼ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¾ tsp. Morton kosher salt and bring to a rolling boil. Cook, whisking often and adjusting heat as needed so the mixture doesn’t boil over, until thickened to a the consistency of pancake syrup and a cloudy amber in color, 5–8 minutes. Remove from heat. Add 6 oz. white chocolate, coarsely chopped, and whisk until chocolate is melted and mixture is smooth. Cover pan and keep sauce warm until ready to use.

To serve, cut profiteroles in half horizontally and scoop a rounded tablespoonful vanilla bean ice cream into each bottom half. Cover with top halves. Divide profiteroles among plates as desired and spoon maple sauce over.
Do ahead: Sauce can be made 2 weeks ahead. Let cool, then transfer to an airtight container and chill. Reheat in 15-second intervals in a microwave-safe bowl, stirring between intervals until pourable; it will separate at first but eventually come together. (Alternatively, you can reheat in a saucepan over low.)

pull-apart-grilled-steak-sandwiches.name: Pull-apart Grilled Steak Sandwiches
instructions: Grease the grill grates with neutral oil and preheat the grill to 177°C (180°C).
Brush the olive oil over the steaks, then sprinkle with the Grill Mates® Montreal Steak Seasoning.

Grill the steaks for 5 minutes per side, or until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center of each steak reads 57°C (57°C). Remove the steaks from the grill and let rest for 10 minutes before slicing into ¼-inch-thick pieces.

Slice the Hawaiian rolls lengthwise. Arrange the steak pieces evenly over the bottom sheet of rolls. Add the caramelized onions on top of the steak. Lay shingled cheese slices on top. Cover with the top sheet of rolls and wrap with aluminum foil.
Place the wrapped sandwiches on the grill grates, close the lid, and grill for 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted.
Serve warm on a large platter, and enjoy!

pumpkin-soup-with-cornbread-crumble-and-.name: Pumpkin Soup With Cornbread Crumble And Chorizo
pumpkin-soup-with-cornbread-crumble-and-.original_name: Sopa de abóbora com crumble de broa e chouriço
instructions: Peel the potatoes, the onion and the pumpkin, cut them into pieces and put them in a pot. Cover with water, season with salt, take it to the fire and let it cook.
Add a thread of olive oil and crush everything with the magic wand, until you get a cream.

Cut the sausage into slices and put it in the oven, preheated to 180°C, until gratin. Then transfer to a mincer or cook robot, add the cornbread and finely grind. Serve each soup with some of this crumble and chopped chives.

pumpkin-soup-with-spiced-nuts.name: Pumpkin Soup With Spiced Nuts

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
Butternut or kabocha squash or pumpkin (about 4 lb.)
ingredients.prep: peeled, halved, seeds removed, cut into 1" cubes (about 8 cups)

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toss almonds with maple syrup, oil, berbere, and salt in a medium bowl until nuts are evenly coated. Scrape onto a rimmed baking sheet and roast, tossing occasionally, until nuts are toasted and maple syrup is caramelized, 20–25 minutes.
Transfer to a sheet of parchment and spread out in an even layer to prevent clusters from forming. Let cool, then coarsely chop and set aside.
Place red pepper flakes and nutmeg in a small heatproof bowl. Heat oil in a small saucepan over high until you see the first wisp of smoke. Gently pour oil over spices and let cool, about 1 hour.
Place thyme, cinnamon sticks, allspice, and cloves in center of cheesecloth; bring up edges together and tie closed with kitchen twine. Set aside.

Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high. Cook onion, stirring often, until softened but not browned, 7–9 minutes. Add garlic, season with salt, and cook, stirring often, until garlic is softened, 3–5 minutes. Add squash and cook, stirring, just until coated in onion mixture, about 1 minute. Add bundle and pour in stock; season with a bit more salt. Bring to a simmer, then reduce heat to medium-low and cook, stirring occasionally, until squash is tender, 20–25 minutes.

Remove bundle and add coconut milk. Bring to a simmer; cook 5 minutes to let flavors meld. Purée soup with an immersion blender until smooth. (Or, purée in batches in a regular blender.) Season with more salt if needed.
To serve, divide soup among bowls. Top with candied spiced nuts and drizzle with chile-nutmeg oil.
